calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Ira Leshin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Jesse Denham was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1 Declaration of Jesse Denham in support of a request for a default judgment-------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Jamal Fesci David dba All Night Market as follows:
$400,000.00 General Damages; $100,000.00 Punitive Damages and $15,011.00 Medical Expenses for a total judgment of $515,011.00.
Plaintiff to submit proposed judgment.
Counsel stipulated for the return of exhibit in open court.
